title: Valve launches Steam Machine and SteamOS, its bet on the PC as a console
summary: Valve's new console sparks debate over its high price and technical limitations in the manufacturing of its components.

title: Lords of the Fallen 2 delays its launch to avoid competing with GTA 6
summary: The action RPG delays its release date to the first quarter of 2027, seeking more time to implement improvements and avoid a very competitive launch period.

title: EA executives claim that generative AI has driven a real increase in creativity
summary: Electronic Arts' top management defends the use of artificial intelligence in development, stating that it accelerates prototyping and opens up new possibilities.

title: Marathon introduces its first experimental PvE mode in the mid-season update
summary: Bungie's shooter adds a single-player or duo mode where participants must leave behind all their loot at the end of the match.

title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer promises high-voltage racing and a roguelike mode
summary: The game's developers compare its gameplay to Burnout Paradise and highlight the difficulty of balancing speed and strategy in podracer races.

title: EA conducts another round of layoffs as its sale to Saudi Arabia for $55 billion progresses
summary: The publisher continues with staff cuts amid the imminent acquisition by the Saudi fund, which will assume a large debt from the company.

title: Hideo Kojima reveals that all publishers rejected his idea for OD, calling it madness
summary: The video game creator states that no major company wanted to publish his new horror title until Xbox accepted the project, praising its bravery.

title: God of War: Laufey has been in development for much longer than previously thought
summary: Cory Barlog, creative director of the saga, was already discussing the idea of the new God of War game and its female protagonist in 2018, according to new revelations and a treasure hunt.

title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is shown in a new trailer with significant graphical improvements
summary: The long-awaited Dragon Ball fighting game promises to be the biggest installment in the series, showcasing West City and a revamped combat system.

title: Tencent plans to withdraw its investments in Japanese studios like Marvelous
summary: The crisis of Chinese investments in the video game sector impacts Japan, putting studios like the developer of Monster Hunter Stories and Story of Seasons at economic risk.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide adds the new Skitarii class and revises the Expeditions mode
summary: The free update introduces a new playable class, and Fatshark was inspired by a classic video game to design the reload animation for its iconic weapon.

title: Blizzard reverses course after controversy and will not remove the most powerful loot in Diablo 4
summary: Diablo 4 modifies its controversial planned changes for Season 14 after community backlash, prioritizing the game's long-term health.

title: Warframe developers lament the decline of Destiny 2: 'A game is healthy when it has competitors'
summary: The end of major updates for Destiny 2 concerns the industry, with the Warframe studio stating that competition is necessary and that no one celebrates the situation.

title: 'VIP early access' scams for GTA 6 appear as analysts speculate on its price
summary: Malwarebytes warns of fraudulent sites offering early access to GTA 6, while the game's cost could reach £100 according to consulted experts.

title: Netflix reveals first plot details of the Gears of War movie
summary: The film adaptation of the popular Xbox horror video game now has a defined plot, according to multiple industry sources.

title: Todd Howard defends Arkane's work on Marvel's Blade amid rumors of Xbox studio closures
summary: The Bethesda executive assures that Arkane is doing an excellent job with the Blade game, giving hope for the studio's future in a climate of uncertainty.

title: Owlcat removes its new launcher for Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader after 19 hours due to fan backlash
summary: The community's negative response forces the studio to backtrack and withdraw the mandatory launcher just one day after its launch.

title: The studio behind one of the best metroidvanias of 2026 announces its closure
summary: The team responsible for one of the year's hidden gems says goodbye to the industry just months after the game's successful launch.

title: The studio that surprised at the 2025 Xbox event declares bankruptcy and its game is canceled
summary: The developer that showed a stunning graphical trailer at the Xbox showcase last year has lost its creators and the project has been officially canceled.

title: Tom Cruise's new movie trailer for 'Digger' confuses and fascinates in equal measure
summary: The next action film starring Tom Cruise presents a very strange trailer filled with his most iconic moments, leaving the audience divided.
